positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustrative design featuring intertwined bioluminescent flora and celestial motifs. Central composition with a prominent lunar crescent surrounded by intricate, stylized roots, delicate vines, and floating geometric constellations. The aesthetic should be a mix of Art Nouveau and modern minimalism, resembling a negative etching or woodcut style, using a limited color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, metallic gold, and cream. Emphasis on clean, strong silhouettes, high contrast, and geometric symmetry. Highly suitable for screen printing or embroidery. Perfect for apparel art.
negative: blur, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, low detail, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, photorealistic, grayscale only
